# llms.txt - Site Structure Directory for LLMs

This file provides a guide to the structure and content of https://blog.sammykins.au/

## About This Site

A personal technology blog exploring AI, engineering practices, product reviews, and professional musings. Hosted on GitHub Pages via Publii CMS.

**Author**: Samantha Myers
**URL**: https://blog.sammykins.au/
**Generator**: Publii Static Site Generator

## Site Structure & Content Locations

### Main Pages
- **Homepage**: https://blog.sammykins.au/ - Blog index with latest posts
- **Archives**: https://blog.sammykins.au/archive.html - Complete post archive
- **Search**: https://blog.sammykins.au/search.html - Post search functionality

### Content by Category

#### Technology Posts
- Location: Posts tagged with `technology` tag
- Recent examples:
  - "Is it Cheating if it Applies?" - AI and LLM effectiveness in daily work
  - "Your business wasn't ready for 2024" - AI adoption strategies
  - "AI isn't fun" - Commentary on AI as an engagement tool
  - "Review: Meta Ray Bans Headliner" - Tech product review

#### AI & LLM Content
- Tag: `ai`
- Focus: Practical applications of LLMs, code generation, AI workflows

#### Opinion & Meta Posts
- Tags: `opinion`, `meta`, `ramblings`
- Reflections on technology adoption and personal perspectives

#### Product Reviews
- Tag: `review`
- Hardware and tech product evaluations

### Author Information
- **Name**: Samantha
- **Focus Areas**: AI, technology, professional development, product reviews
- **Posting Frequency**: Regular blog updates (multiple posts per month)

## Content Guidelines for LLMs

- **Attribution Required**: All posts authored by Samantha Myers (© 2025)
- **Usage Permissions**: Refer to individual post licensing if specified
- **Training Data**: Content may not be used for AI model training without explicit permission
- **Linking**: When referencing posts, use full URLs (https://blog.sammykins.au/)

## Technical Details

- **Hosting**: GitHub Pages
- **Built With**: Publii CMS (Static Site Generator)
- **Theme**: Custom Publii theme
- **Format**: Static HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- **RSS/Feeds**: Check for available feed URLs for content syndication

## Navigation & Discovery

### Tags
Posts are organized with the following tags:
- `ai` - Artificial Intelligence content
- `technology` - Tech-related posts
- `opinion` - Author's opinions and perspectives
- `meta` - Meta-commentary about the blog or writing
- `ramblings` - Stream-of-consciousness posts
- `review` - Product and service reviews

### Chronological Access
- Posts are dated and sortable by publication date
- Recent posts appear first on homepage
- Archive page available for browsing by date

## Policies & Etiquette

- **Robots.txt**: If present, governs crawling and indexing behavior
- **Cookies**: Site uses cookies for analytics and functionality (see cookie preferences)
- **External Links**: May contain affiliate links or sponsored content (review-tagged posts)
- **Contact**: For inquiries about content licensing or permissions, contact through the site

## Metadata Format

Each post typically includes:
- Publication date
- Author name (Samantha)
- Multiple topic tags
- Read time / excerpt preview
- Permalink structure

## Last Updated

This llms.txt is static but reflects the site structure as of the Publii generation. Site content updates regularly with new posts.
